$comment: Per-environment values for Dataverse environment variables. Key = schema name of the environment variable, Value = { environment-slug: value }. Updated when new environment variables are added to solutions.

dmi_FirstContactPromptTemplate.dmi-test: You are a space mission signal analyst. Be concise and military-precise.
dmi_FirstContactPromptTemplate.dmi-prod: You are a space mission signal analyst. Be concise and military-precise.

$comment_managed_identity: PD_MANAGEDIDENTITY_ prefix instructs ManagedIdentityConfigService to update customizations.xml at deploy time.
